entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The cotton bollworm, a pest monitored for insecticide resistance in India.

entities.name: INSECTICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the cotton bollworm to survive exposure to insecticides.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the monitoring of insecticide resistance was conducted.

entities.name: DISCRIMINATING DOSE BIOASSAY TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique used to monitor seasonal changes in insecticide resistance.

entities.name: INSECTICIDE SYNERGIST COMBINATIONS
entities.description: Combinations used to elucidate the mechanisms of insecticide resistance.

entities.name: PYRETHROIDS
entities.description: A class of insecticides to which resistance was described.

entities.name: ENDOSULFAN
entities.description: An insecticide to which resistance was described.

entities.name: ORGANOPHOSPHATES
entities.description: A class of insecticides to which resistance was described.

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: The crop affected by the cotton bollworm.

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of insects contributing to the spread of resistance.

entities.name: FARMER INSECTICIDE USE STRATEGIES
entities.description: Local practices of insecticide application correlated with resistance status.
